testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: 1 expectation failed. Expected status code <200> but was <400>.

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: 1 expectation failed. Expected status code <200> but was <400>.

failure.message: 1 expectation failed. Expected status code <200> but was <409>.
